title: Farting villagers
description: This resource pack adds farting noises to villagers! No extra mods needed!
body:
- This resource pack adds farting noises to villagers!
- Good one to troll friends or just to have a good laugh!
- Villagers have to fart too, dude!

**_THIS RESOURCE PACK DOES NOT NEED ANY OTHER EXTERNAL MODS TO WORK._**
